title: 皐月賞の後に・汝が吼えるは

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Leading at the front is Yaeno Muteki! Yaeno
Muteki!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And she's done it! Yaeno Muteki secures another
win in her fourth-ever race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Ah... It looks like Mejiro Ramonu's little sister isn't
quite what her sister was.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
But I guess it's unfair to compare them. I wonder
how things'll go with the Derby, though...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Pant!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I did it! I conquered the Satsuki Sho!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Yessss!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: And I will win the Japanese Derby, too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Ngh...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(I was unable to claim victory... How
disappointing.)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: If I don't do something... I'll never ever win!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I want to be more like my role model... I want to
catch up to her...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I want to win the race she yearns for...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I said I'd win! I made up my mind... I vowed I
would!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
If I don't do something... the Japanese Derby is
going to slip from my grasp! I'm going to lose... to
Yaeno!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I have to train even, even more!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her race at the Satsuki Sho over, I head out
to greet Mejiro Ardan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'm terribly sorry for such a disappointing
performance.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Far from outshining the crown jewel, I only
managed to showcase how dull my light remains...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
In no way did I perform to the best of my current
ability...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Although it looks like her frustration has kept her from realizing it, Mejiro Ardan has just returned with dignity after participating in the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After her debut race, she outright collapsed from
exhaustion. But now, even after having finished a
G1 race, she stands strong.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That she can now compete in G1 races is a
testament to how much she's grown!
choice_data_list:
Let's learn from this experience and work even
harder.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...It's very much like you to say that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It's precisely because you always have your sights
on what's ahead that I can continue moving
forward as well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
When I run in the Aoba Sho, I shall not repeat any
of the mistakes I made today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I ask that you continue to provide me with your
guidance and support.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Aoba Sho right around the corner,
Mejiro Ardan has shown me how committed she is
to delivering results that'll put us in good stead
for the Japanese Derby.
